hypothesis: Because qualified visitors may lack price and response-time clarity, adding an eligibility summary, honest price range, and response expectation near the primary CTA should increase qualified contact rate without increasing unqualified-lead rate.
audience: New visitors to two high-intent service pages
intervention: Add a concise decision-assistance block near the primary CTA on selected pages.
decision_rule: Scale only if the primary metric improves materially and no guardrail worsens beyond the pre-agreed threshold after the minimum complete measurement window.
